name: io.github.helinakdogan/agent-magnet
description: Behavioral memory layer for AI tools. Learns preferences and context across Claude, Cursor, Codex.

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your identifier used as the memory key across all tools

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_OPENAI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for the reflector and classifier models

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_LOCAL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to use local SQLite storage — no Redis or external services needed

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_REDIS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Redis connection URL for persistent shared storage (overrides local mode)

environmentVariables.name: MAGNET_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Namespace for memory isolation across projects (defaults to 'default')
